description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Release Game that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build-windows and build-mac. The build-windows job runs on windows-latest, installs Python 3.9 and required packages, builds the game using PyInstaller, and creates a release with the built game files. The build-mac job runs on macos-latest, depends on build-windows, installs Python 3.9 and required packages, builds the game using PyInstaller, and uploads the built game files as a release asset.
